name: cachy

metadata.name: cachy
metadata.summary: Cachy provides a simple yet effective caching library.

documentation:
# Cachy

```{image} https://travis-ci.org/sdispater/cachy.png
:alt: Cachy Build status
:target: https://travis-ci.org/sdispater/cachy
```

Cachy provides a simple yet effective caching library.

The full documentation is available here: <http://cachy.readthedocs.org>

## Resources

- [Documentation](http://cachy.readthedocs.org)
- [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/sdispater/cachy/issues)

This cache store implementation is meant to be used
only in development or test environments and it never stores anything.
